high_level_description: First-person view of a dark, bezel-less spacecraft instrument bench after dark, pale bone displays glowing as the room's only light, contemporary certified avionics register.

style_description.aesthetics: contemporary flight-deck instrumentation, calm and certified, restrained severity grammar, functional equipment design, inhabited after dark
style_description.lighting: the instrument bench is the only light source in a dark room, warm dark ambience never blue-black, pale bone displays glowing softly, faint amber and green light pooling on matte surfaces
style_description.photo: eye-level first-person view of a seated operator, 35mm lens, f/2.8, focus on the central display, the bench spanning the full frame with slight natural perspective

compositional_deconstruction.background: A dim room after dark, deep warm-brown darkness with no visible walls. A wide instrument bench spans the frame, matte dark surfaces, bezel-less display regions separated by empty space and precise alignment rather than frames or tiles, no glossy glass, no boxed cards.

elements.desc: The hero instrument: a large dark display panel with pale bone reticle linework, showing a toroidal bubble cross-section rendered as a computed medical-imaging visualization with a faint false-color ramp from deep cool blue to warm amber, thin annotation marks, matte and diagnostic, no gloss.

Small monospaced capitals with wide letterspacing, light tabular weight, printed in pale bone directly on the matte bench surface, sitting flush on the panel's alignment grid like certified equipment labeling.
A slim synthetic-horizon strip: one thin level bone line with small tick marks, quiet and peripheral, faintly luminous.
A compact dense gauge cluster, small and tightly packed, an invented instrument language with fine bone numerals and thin arc scales, low and modest in the composition.

A right-side control panel: a quiet vertical stack of thin ruled proposal regions, and at its base a small utilization meter with a needle resting inside a marked band, one restrained amber annotation at the band's edge.
A slim full-width operator strip docked at the bench's bottom edge, carrying one quiet green physiological trace line, dim and steady.
An unlit master-caution lamp cluster top center: three small dark lamp shapes with faint outlined edges, all nominal, no active alerts.
